title: <div><font face="ZapfDingbatsITC">✔</font> Maintains the literary themes of prop
content:
✔ Maintains the literary themes of prophecy, destiny, and manipulation.

📌 FINAL LOCK-IN QUESTIONS BEFORE EXECUTING VERSION 8.8

1. Should There Be a Secret Countermechanic That Cancels a Fate Manipulation?

✔ Ex: If someone alters the wheel, should another character or item be able to undo it secretly?

2. Should Unique Archetypes Have One Specific “Purge Moment” in the Semester?

✔ Ex: Instead of purging anytime, should there be a scheduled event where it is possible?

3. Should The Ritual Be Openly Announced, or Should It Be Conducted in Secret?

✔ Ex: Should the whole class know who is undergoing the transformation, or should it be a hidden process?

🚀 Now ready to execute Version 8.8. Awaiting final input before moving forward. 🎮📖 Are you fully satisfied with this plan?
context: From document: RPG Character System (Fully Integrated into Weekly Modules) — chunk 526 (chunk 526/555)
